narrative: Machine Learning Engineer at Unacademy with seven years of experience, currently based in Berlin. Strong verified skill depth in modern retrieval techniques—evidenced by hands‑on work with LoRA, QLoRA, pgvector and Elasticsearch/OpenSearch—propelled the ranking. The profile also shows solid breadth of technical skills across PyTorch and product‑focused ML pipelines, and a stable tenure at a product‑first company. Alignment with the senior AI/ML role is clear: direct experience building vector‑search solutions and deploying large‑scale models for content recommendation. The main drawback is geographic mismatch; relocation to Pune/Noida is uncertain, and modest platform engagement plus minor trust flags temper confidence.
